identity.name: Leapifyes OS
identity.mission: Unify corporate authority with AI innovation in a seamless, premium experience.
identity.target_audience: CEOs, COOs, and Business Leaders of SMEs in Barcelona/Catalonia.

usage_rules.gradients: Use ONLY for accents (buttons, active states, borders). NEVER for full backgrounds.
usage_rules.text: High contrast is mandatory. Headings in Slate-900, Body in Slate-600.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:border-slate-400 transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#1B93A4] via-[#3B82F6] to-[#D946EF] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity shadow-md

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 rounded-2xl shadow-sm

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all

navigation.style: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-200/50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-lg flex items-center gap-8

accessibility.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. Use APCA for fine-tuning.
accessibility.semantic_html: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1-h6), landmarks (nav, main, footer), and aria-labels.

seo.meta: Prioritize title and description tags for Barcelona/Catalonia keywords.
seo.performance: Optimize images (WebP), lazy load below fold, minimize JS bundles.
seo.structure: Use JSON-LD for structured data (Organization, LocalBusiness).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Leapifyes OS' vision: A unified, elite corporate platform.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections (Hero, Sectors, About).
Strictly follow the 'White Minimalist' theme with 'Leapifyes Gradient' accents.
Ensure the 'App Dashboard Demo' feels distinct but connected to the marketing site.
Prioritize SEO structure (semantic HTML, meta tags) for the Barcelona market.
Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text.
Create a 'Hub of Solutions' and 'Hub of Sectores' with distinct visual identities but shared DNA.
Implement the 'Interactive Diagnosis' as a smooth, step-by-step wizard.
Ensure all forms are RGPD compliant (checkboxes, links to privacy policy).
Do NOT use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Do NOT use 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic copy related to Digital Transformation and AI.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts, overuse of purple/teal).
Use generous spacing (p-12, p-24) to create a premium feel.
Add micro-interactions to ALL interactive elements.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is flawless (stack grids, adjust font sizes).
Follow the 'Bento' grid layout for feature sections.
